name: Dayforce HCM
description: Dayforce simplifies work with a unified HCM platform for HR, payroll, talent, and more—boosting productivity and compliance at scale. Learn more about Dayforce HCM

reviews.review_description: Simply, easy. I’m a user of it, not an admin so I think I use it less but it’s helpful to keep track of everything,
reviews.review_pros: Reports are easy to read, easily accessible for printing. All the tabs are smart phone friendly (other platforms I’ve had issues with)
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes the app does an update that causes issues or lags but the people who run it are quick to fix it.

reviews.review_description: Overall it is good software, gives bunch of options and flexibility. Easy to use by the staff and UI is good however for back end admin staff it might ne challenging
reviews.review_pros: UI is simple and user friendly. Able to see vacation, time off, pending request and apprved and their balance. Ability to schedule time off is big plus
reviews.review_cons: compatability with other softwares. Have to a lot of manual work through excels and stuff just to transfer data into it

reviews.review_description: It is a love-hate relationship. When it works, it works well, but when it doesn't its a major pain and usually causes me to have to use a workaround which is not what we pay for.
reviews.review_pros: Having all employee information in one place and the various tasks that you can do on one platform.
reviews.review_cons: It can be very temperamental and troublesome to use. Some of the logic of the operations does not mesh with real-life practices. Some of the things you think should work a certain way do not, and it causes extra work.

reviews.review_pros: is really easy to use, I love that I can see all my work stuff there and change things myself.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes I have a hard time logging in with my PingOne. But most of the time, this is not an issue.

reviews.review_pros: All-in-One Platform Real-Time Data Processing User-Friendly Interface Mobile Accessibility Customizable and Scalable Advanced Analytics and Reporting Strong Integration with other enterprise software Compliance and Security Professional Support Community Engagement David Ossip
reviews.review_cons: constant software enhancement with issues. lack of transparency in fees.

reviews.review_title: Dayforce HCM - Efficient and streamlined system
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, Dayforce HCM has been an outstanding business decision due to immense efficiencies, improvements to employee/candidate experience and streamline payroll. As for All in Ones, Dayforce is and will be the top of lists if I ever am in the position of commissioning a new system.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use - Extremely efficient system - The Implementation studio is an amazing tool that helps improve employee experience and efficiencies. Has Streamlined payroll processes - Speedy payruns.
reviews.review_cons: Dayforce is complex to configure due to how large the system is. Support can be a little slow but nothing extremely notable.

reviews.review_description: Production lags heavily, and causes impacts our payroll processing pace of completing payroll. We have to slow down to a slow pace as the system is very slow most of the time.
reviews.review_pros: System is very intuitive. amazing product if it is configured correcting and staff is trained fully to use the system
reviews.review_cons: Tax customer service is the absolute worst. they would take money/ach our account without prior approval on multiple occasions. Which breaks our contractual agreement. DF has processes such as sending and ATD to be signed prior to debiting the account however this wasn't followed multiple times. also PII info was a concern. I received and email from DF saying your email config was updated. They had added email to our account of humans that never have worked here. they crossed wires between client and added emails to our email config from some company we have no affiliation with.

reviews.review_title: Dayforce is a highly intelligent system with large reporting capabilities
reviews.review_pros: The payroll system is intuitive and reports are robust.
reviews.review_cons: Implementation was incredibly long and the support ticket advisors are usually poorly trained. During implementation we had several different project managers due to turnover. Most of the advisors we have had directly from Ceridian have been so siloed they did not understand how their section of the system effected other systems. This has caused many issues down the line for us. I am still correcting things set up wrong during implementation.

reviews.review_description: Positive experience overall. We were previously using an HRIS that didn't display all of the information we needed and our employees were never able to view it, so using Dayforce has made our employee's experience with their information positive but also provided them with the autonomy they didn't previously have in our old system.
reviews.review_pros: It's very user friendly for the end user. I like how everything is housed in one HRIS and I am able to view all of the employee's information in one easy place. The data is visually easy to read and it's conveniently in one place.
reviews.review_cons: The reporting function. Creating reports from scratch isn't that simple for users who aren't familiar with how to create reports. I feel like this could be enhanced and simplified so that creating reports is easier. I also think the number of clicks it takes to do certain functions could be reduced by using shorthand or typing and having the system auto-populate information.

reviews.review_description: Quite good, never experienced any crashing, or it being shut down for maintenance. Like I said very easy to navigate, overall, I recommend Dayforce.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to navigate, well organize, and is very secure.
reviews.review_cons: I haven't yet found anything that bothers me about Dayforce HCM

reviews.review_title: Dayforce - Reliable, all-in-one package for the majority of your HCM needs
reviews.review_description: From the perspective of a system administrator, Dayforce is a reliable, thorough HRIS/HCM package that touches all major items in an employees lifecycle - Ongoing maintenance can be time consuming, but the overall experience for end users is worth it. Onboarding, Recruitment, Engagement and scheduling are best in class modules and worth the effort to implement.
reviews.review_pros: All in one, start to finish employee lifecycle solution Onboarding and recruitment modules are leaders in the field Ability to thoroughly cover payroll and scheduling compliance for both Australia and New Zealand Both custom forms and workflows create genuine ability to fill any gaps you find in processes. Customer Success Management genuinely fights for their clients Uptime and environment support is reliable Integration options are vast and reliable
reviews.review_cons: Upgrade cadence is too frequent, leaving me chasing my tail as an admin General support without escalation can be slow at times Some modules are still North American Focused (Benefits and Compensation specifically)

reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with Dayforce HCM has been positive. It’s a powerful tool that helps manage HR, payroll, and time tracking in one place, though it takes a bit of time to learn.
reviews.review_pros: What I appreciate most about Dayforce HCM is how seamlessly it brings together payroll, HR, time tracking, and benefits into one centralized platform. It eliminates the need to switch between multiple systems, which saves time and improves accuracy. The real-time data updates are especially useful for payroll processing and staying compliant. The interface is user-friendly, and the ability to generate customized reports and dashboards makes workforce management much more streamlined. It’s a comprehensive and efficient solution for both administrators and employees.
reviews.review_cons: What I liked least about Dayforce HCM was the steep learning curve. It took some time to get used to the system, and a few tasks felt more complicated than they needed to be.

reviews.review_pros: It is very convenient because I can do a lot on the app, example, schedule and payroll. People can see who they are working with and also they can book their vacations through the app.
reviews.review_cons: There is a lot of features that it may take some time for people to get to know how it all works. There's also a bit of trouble when people are clocking in due to the location having errors.

reviews.review_description: Overall is a great system. Employees find it easy to use.
reviews.review_pros: It's an all in one HR/payroll system. We can customize modules and forms.
reviews.review_cons: The amount of information can be overwhelming sometimes. For example, there are so many reports but creating one from scratch and making sure the information populates or is available can be challenging.

reviews.review_description: I have enjoyed learning all areas of Dayforce and becoming a expert in Payroll and Benefits
reviews.review_pros: It is very user friendly and the community guides you through areas that you need a refresher on.
reviews.review_cons: I think the reporting section, needs a little work and running reports can be hard.

reviews.review_description: I think its okay as too many updates and requires lots of time to learn the system.
reviews.review_pros: It's very user-friendly for employees. The system also offers wide range of tools that streamline HR operations.
reviews.review_cons: Too many updates and the reporting feature is too complex and not very user friendly.

reviews.review_pros: I have used this at my past company for HR solutions, paystubs, yearend form, pie charts on salary breakdown is useful too
reviews.review_cons: I believe the cost is the one factor that would stand out. Haven't had any other issues with the product.

reviews.review_title: Great program for employee self serve
reviews.review_pros: Great program for a large company, focused on easy accessible programs and employee self serve functions! My group feels empowered and capable, and know that I am there to support them in case the need it!
reviews.review_cons: I personally would like to see more online training videos for myself as the HR person and some available for employees as well.

reviews.review_pros: Very customizable to each Company's needs
reviews.review_cons: Because it's so customizable, it can be very difficult to learn the technical "behind the scenes" setup functions

reviews.review_description: I used it on my previous work, and I can strongly say that great software fro employee. I was always able to see my full payrolls, download it and manage my work time.
reviews.review_pros: It's greater platform to manage your payrolls, taxes form, update your employee info, scheduled day offs and see your shift time. Easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: No issue. Always works perfect. Web version has more option. Mobile app help to use it any time. No bugs.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Very convenient to access on mobile app. 1 stop shop for all employment information
reviews.review_pros: I am able to access all my employment data including salaries breakdown, T4, shift schedule vacations, sick leave and everthing work related. Very convenient
reviews.review_cons: Some icons present on the mobile app is absent on the web version

reviews.review_description: For the most part I really like it and the accuracy.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of clocking in and authorizing my time.
reviews.review_cons: Receiving code in order to proceed can take a moment, at time

reviews.review_title: dayForce makes tracking my time off requests easy
reviews.review_description: Really good. I use it all the time to track what days I have off coming up, my remaining balance and to store and fine my payslips.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and find info on. I can book time off quickly and find my payslips
reviews.review_cons: Not sure why there are two ways to find the same thing. Seems repetitive

reviews.review_description: A game-changer in HCM software, especially for time and payroll management.
reviews.review_pros: One-stop place to access employee pay information.
reviews.review_cons: The app freezes up or doesn't work properly at least 1-2 times a month.

reviews.review_title: Discover what Dayforce has to offer!
reviews.review_description: Dayforce is necessary for our workplace to hold our staff information. The support team is always available and very knowledgeable to assist!
reviews.review_pros: organizes staff information layout is easy to use staff can access new policies & procedures lots of informative webinars with lots of information to share.
reviews.review_cons: having enough time to use it to its full potential! :)
